summary: Trading bot project on Internet Computer (ICP) using ICDex exchange. Bot canister: xeccu-3iaaa-aaaai-at4kq-cai, controlled by principal 7om5v-4ertl-w75xg-of3g3-uznaj-7gsav-r2ekd-d36r4-273ar-lpm45-vqe. ~48 ckUSDT deposited to ICDex for trading. Bot is failing to create orders due to incorrect use of getOpenOrders method (should be 'pending'). User plans to also send ~$40 ICP to ICDex.
architectural_notes: ICDex canister: jgxow-pqaaa-aaaar-qahaq-cai — external exchange, not owned by user
~48 ckUSDT deposited to ICDex for bot trading operations
Cycles for bot computation must be sent to bot canister xeccu-3iaaa-aaaai-at4kq-cai via NNS top-up, not to ICDex canister
known_issues: Bot fails to create orders: getOpenOrders method does not exist on ICDex — must be replaced with 'pending'. Fix should be done in small incremental steps to avoid budget_exceeded errors.

new_feature_requests.summary: In backend/main.mo, locate only the first occurrence where getOpenOrders is called on the ICDex actor inside the tradingLoop function. Replace that single call with the correct 'pending' method. Do not change any other part of the file. Preserve all surrounding logic, variable names, and structure exactly as-is.
